context.summary: While wiring drizzle migrations I discovered two concrete follow-ups that are out of scope for #23 but must happen before #24 can be closed.

issues.title: [backend] fix(db): drop unused aiProviderEnum alias introduced by drizzle-kit
issues.body:
## Goal
drizzle-kit generated a second `ai_provider` enum clone; unused but blocks idempotent migrate.

## Acceptance criteria
- Migration drops the alias.
- `pnpm --filter @webapp/api db:migrate` is idempotent on a seeded DB.

## Out of scope
- Refactoring the canonical enum.
issues.reason: Discovered during drizzle-kit generate; unrelated to the parent scope.

issues.title: [coord] docs(api): document DATABASE_URL placeholder in apps/api/README.md
issues.body:
## Goal
README still lists pre-DB env vars only. Add `DATABASE_URL` + link to docker-compose bootstrap.

## Acceptance criteria
- README mentions `DATABASE_URL` and points at `docker-compose up -d postgres`.
- No new content outside the Env + Run sections.

## Out of scope
- Rewriting the README.
issues.reason: Parent issue (#23) was scoped to schema/migration only; README update is a clear follow-up.
